name: @usejunior/safedocx-mcpb
description: Claude Desktop MCP Bundle (.mcpb) wrapper for @usejunior/safe-docx

scripts.build: npm run build -w @usejunior/docx-core && npm run build -w @usejunior/docx-mcp && node esbuild.config.mjs
scripts.pack:mcpb: npm run build && npx -y @anthropic-ai/mcpb@2.1.2 validate . && npx -y @anthropic-ai/mcpb@2.1.2 pack . safe-docx.mcpb
